steps: Go to https://developer.x.com and sign in with your X (Twitter) account
Click 'Sign up for Free Account' or log in to your existing developer account
Create a new Project by clicking 'Create Project', give it a name and description
Inside the project, create a new App and give it a name
Go to your App's settings and enable 'OAuth 2.0' under 'User authentication settings'
Set the App type (e.g. Web App) and add a callback URL (e.g. https://localhost:3000/callback)
Go to the 'Keys and tokens' tab and note your Client ID and Client Secret
Store the Client Secret securely — it is shown only once

credential_fields.name: client_id
credential_fields.label: Client ID
credential_fields.description: OAuth 2.0 Client ID from the App's Keys and tokens tab

credential_fields.name: client_secret
credential_fields.label: Client Secret
credential_fields.description: OAuth 2.0 Client Secret — shown only once at creation

notes: Free tier (Basic) allows 1 app and limited read/write access
OAuth 2.0 is required for user-context endpoints (tweets, follows, likes)
The Client Secret is shown only once — save it immediately
The X Ads API requires a separate Ads API access approval at https://ads.x.com/help
API access tiers: Free, Basic ($100/mo), Pro ($5000/mo)

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's profile (requires user OAuth 2.0 token)
